name: the-diamond-sutra
description: The Diamond Sutra and the Sutra of Hui-neng — two of the most treasured works of Buddhist literature, offering profound teachings on emptiness, non-attachment, and the direct realization of enlightenment.
useCase: Study the Diamond Sutra's teachings on emptiness, understand Hui-neng's path to sudden enlightenment, and practice non-attachment in daily life.
knownRisks: Ancient Buddhist texts — require careful reading; teachings can be misconstrued as nihilism
Translations vary — different editions interpret key terms differently
Zen teachings resist intellectual analysis — the skill provides context but cannot replace direct practice
